name: Basic Bangers
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely mince the pork shoulder and pork fat.
2. Season generously with salt, pepper, and at least a pinch each of nutmeg, ground cloves, mace, and thyme.
3. Add breadcrumbs and egg yolks to the meat mixture and mix well until combined.
4. Refrigerate the mixture for about 30 minutes to make it easier to handle.
5. Stuff the prepared sausage skins with the mixture, twist the ends securely.
6. If sausage skins are unavailable, coat them in beaten eggs and then roll in dry breadcrumbs.
7. Serve grilled or fried.
